title: Emerald Equipment
description: This mod adds emerald tools, armor, and horse armor. Emerald tools will be faster at mining than most tools. Emerald tier items have values between iron and diamond tiers.
body:
# Emerald Equipment Mod

![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/omQJyNZU/d6b43f8eac6cad3d484ca093ec82f13b5ce2c1f7.png)

## Harness the power of emeralds with Emerald Equipment!

Explore a new tier of tools, armor, and horse armor crafted from emeralds in Minecraft. This mod introduces robust equipment that strikes a balance between iron and diamond tiers, offering enhanced efficiency and durability.

## Features:

- Emerald Tools: Mine faster with tools that boast a durability of 250, efficiency of 14, and attack damage of 6.5.
- Emerald Armor: Provides substantial protection with armor ratings of 20 (helmet), 24 (chestplate), 25 (leggings), and 23 (boots), alongside a toughness of 0.5.
- Emerald Horse Armor: Offers superior protection for your horse with a rating of 8.

## Specifications:

- Durability: 250 uses
- Tool Efficiency: 14
- Attack Damage: 6.5
- Enchantability: 24
- Armor Ratings: Helm (2), Chestplate (4), Leggings (5), Boots (3)
- Armor Enchantability: 9
- Toughness: 0.5
- Horse Armor Rating: 8

## Enhance Your Gameplay:

- Balanced Performance: Positioned between iron and diamond tiers, providing a reliable choice for both efficiency and durability.
- Versatile Use: Perfect for players seeking strong equipment without reaching diamond rarity.
- Seamless Integration: Crafting recipes that integrate smoothly with vanilla Minecraft mechanics.

Dive into the world of Emerald Equipment and equip yourself with the strength and resilience of emeralds!

_Download now and elevate your Minecraft adventures with Emerald Equipment!_
